stream_samples.text: discord voice keeps cutting out on the brazil-south region tonight. 600ms RTT spikes every 30s, full disconnect every few minutes. ipv6 issue?
AutoMod v3 nuked 40% of the messages in our gaming server today. Real users banned for saying "gg ez" in casual chat. Mods spent 5 hours unbanning.
[#VOICE-3340 P1] users in br-south and us-south-2 reporting jitter spikes >150ms p95 since the routing change Tuesday. Voice quality unusable.
Android push notifications for DMs delayed 4-8 minutes. Pixel 8 Pro on Android 14. Foreground service kept alive, doze mode disabled. Still late.
AutoMod v3 false-positive rate jumped from 3.1% to 14.8% on launch day. Mod queue backlog is at 92k items, oldest is 31 hours, growing 4k/hr.
Tried to promote a speaker in our Stage channel — button just spins, never resolves. Audience can hear the speaker but can't see them in the speaker list.
Voice quality regression in br-south is real — UDP packet loss p95 up from 0.4% to 3.2% since we shifted carriers Tuesday. Drop-call rate doubled.
screen share at 60fps on linux drops to single-digit fps every 90 seconds. fedora 40, wayland, native client. been broken since the april update
[#MOD-1158] Subscribed to Nitro 9 hours ago, custom stickers and 100MB upload still locked. Refunded once already, retried, same issue.
AutoMod v3 is flagging slang in non-English channels at 3-4x the rate of v2. Our Spanish community feels targeted. We turned it off entirely.
Mod-action appeal volume up 220% since Monday's AutoMod v3 push — appeal queue SLA breached for 38% of tickets. Need product decision.
the new soundboard sounds in voice channels are a delight, my friend group is having way too much fun
[automod-v3] regex tokenizer was retrained without held-out non-English eval set. F1 collapsed on es-ES and pt-BR — needs immediate eval-gate before re-enable.
Nitro entitlement-grant pipeline lagging 4-12 hours after Stripe webhook. Renewals are fine, new subs and upgrades are the regression.

clusters.title: AutoMod v3 false-positive surge across non-English locales
Voice quality drop in br-south / us-south-2 regions
Nitro entitlement grant lag for new subs/upgrades

top_epic.title: Roll back AutoMod v3 + add non-English eval gate
top_epic.rationale: 2,280 signals — split between user reports of false bans and internal Trust & Safety telemetry — pinpoint a single root cause: AutoMod v3 was retrained without a held-out non-English eval set, F1 collapsed on es-ES and pt-BR, and the false-positive rate jumped from 3.1% to 14.8% on launch day. Mod queue backlog is 92k and growing 4k/hr; appeal SLA is breached for 38% of tickets. Trust in moderation is the load-bearing primitive for community-led servers — every false-positive is a story that ends up on r/discordapp.
top_epic.verdict: Trust-critical — moderation false-positives erode community trust faster than any other surface.
top_epic.recommendation: Roll back AutoMod v3 to v2 thresholds, add a per-locale eval gate (held-out es-ES, pt-BR, ja-JP, ko-KR, ar-SA corpora), and re-enable v3 only when F1 holds across all locales.
acceptance_criteria: AutoMod v3 rolled back to v2 thresholds for all non-English locales within 24h
Per-locale held-out eval suite (es-ES, pt-BR, ja-JP, ko-KR, ar-SA, fr-FR, de-DE) gates AutoMod merges in CI
False-positive rate returns to under 4% across all locales before v3 re-enable
Appeal-queue SLA wired to PagerDuty: pages on-call when p95 appeal age > 4h

evidence.quote: AutoMod v3 false-positive rate jumped from 3.1% to 14.8% on launch day. Mod queue backlog is at 92k items.
regex tokenizer was retrained without held-out non-English eval set. F1 collapsed on es-ES and pt-BR.
AutoMod v3 nuked 40% of the messages in our gaming server today. Real users banned for saying "gg ez".
